title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh argues that teaching AI by hand at human speed, focusing on mathematical foundations rather than latest tools, builds durable skills resilient to hype cycles. He contends that people, not AI, drive meaningful change in AI systems.
